s: Third-party app for quick access, not affiliated with Agenzia delle Entrate
d:
IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER AND OFFICIAL SOURCE
This application, Ricevapp Documento Commerciale, is a third-party app and DOES NOT represent a government entity. It is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported in any way by the Italian Revenue Agency (Agenzia delle Entrate).
The app solely provides facilitated access via WebView to the public web service "Documento Commerciale Online," for which the official government source is: https://ivaservizi.agenziaentrate.gov.it/portale/

Tired of the Inconvenience? Here's Ricevapp Documento Commerciale.
Are you an artisan, a merchant, or a professional who needs to issue an Online Commercial Document? You know well that the official service doesn't have its own app and that logging in every time from a browser can be cumbersome.
This is precisely why I developed Ricevapp Documento Commerciale. I created it primarily for myself: I needed a quick solution for accessing and issuing tax receipts, at no cost.

Your Solution for Free Tax Receipts
Ricevapp is a third-party web-app that solves a practical problem: your need for immediate access, every time, without paying for subscriptions:
• Maximum Access Speed: The app takes you to the online commercial document procedure as efficiently as possible, saving you precious time. If you wish, you can save your Fisconline/Entratel credentials exclusively locally on your device to speed up the entire login process.
• Protected and Compatible Access: To ensure privacy, access to the app is protected at every launch. It uses the unlock method set on your device (such as fingerprint, facial recognition, PIN, or pattern). This prevents unauthorized access to your saved data. Note: The unlock method is only requested if you have set one up in your device's security settings.
• Free Forever: Forget the costs of a cash register or subscription-based software services. This app is and will remain completely free.
• Designed by a Professional: Developed by an artisan who understands the need for simple, effective, and, above all, free tax tools.
Download Ricevapp now and make accessing your online tax service faster and more secure!
